parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Troublemaker and says he switched Carly and Mike. However, Carly claims she stole the Troublemaker card (acting as the Robber), which would mean Justin is lying about his role. Mitchell and Mike both insist that Justin is the Tanner, a common strategy used by Werewolves to protect a teammate by making them appear as the Tanner so the Village avoids voting them. If Justin is the Werewolf and Mitchell/Mike are his teammates, voting Justin will result in a Village win.
